'''HM-3''' was a [[Legal analyst droid]] active in the halls of the [[Galactic Alliance Senate]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. HM-3 helped [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] change a law about changing laws in order to get more supplies to the [[Galactic Alliance Guard|GAG]], but the law was later used to [[Solo-Niathal coup|remove]] [[Cal Omas]] from office in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. HM-3 reminded Jacen of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]; humanoid in shape with a personality, but was strongly professional.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
